name: free2ai
description: Search, rank, and explain open-source AI models, tools, datasets, and papers by FNI score

tools.name: free2ai_search
tools.description: Search and rank AI tools, models, datasets, and papers by FNI score. Returns ranked results with metadata.

tools.name: free2ai_rank
tools.description: Rank AI tools by FNI score for a given task context. Ideal for AI agents selecting the best tool for a job.

task.description: The task to rank tools for

tools.name: free2ai_explain
tools.description: Explain why a specific AI entity received its FNI ranking score with factor breakdown (Semantic, Authority, Popularity, Recency, Quality).

id.description: Entity name or ID to explain (e.g. 'meta-llama/Llama-3-8B')
